title: I use the premium Dreame Aqua10 Ultra robovac in my own home, but this alternative at 44% off is a smarter buy
summary: It's also a machine that promises excellent edge cleaning, since it uses the exact same side brush and extending roller mop as the Ultra model. Runner up: Dreame Aqua10 Ultra Roller 3.
